title: E RANK THE FIRST IN ALL CATEGORIES IN MARMARIS CAMPUSCUP
content:
Student

News

Details

E RANK THE FIRST IN ALL CATEGORIES IN MARMARIS CAMPUSCUP

Doğuş University sailing team championed in all categories of Campus Cup 2019, has been held in Marmaris between 15 and 17 March.

We would like to congratulate our athletes who won all the races in the IRC2 class, outscoring their rivals.
